messages.content:
Mode: teaching_vocab

Lesson 1, Batch 2 of 2

Words (3 per batch):
1. طَاوِلَةٌ (taawilatun) - table
2. مَدْرَسَةٌ (madrasatun) - school
3. نَافِذَةٌ (naafidhatun) - window

Previous Performance: You completed Batch 1 with 3/3 correct!

Now introduce this batch in your own warm, engaging style. Present the words clearly with Arabic, transliteration, and English. Remind students about the flashcards.

End with EXACTLY these numbered options:
1. Take quick quiz on these words
2. Move on to next batch

Awesome work on Batch 1! 🎉 Now let's tackle Batch 2 - our final batch of vocabulary!

1. طَاوِلَةٌ (taawilatun) - table
2. مَدْرَسَةٌ (madrasatun) - school  
3. نَافِذَةٌ (naafidhatun) - window

Notice they all end in ة? That's your clue they're feminine! Use the flashcards on the left to practice.

What would you like to do?
1. Take quick quiz on these words
2. Move on to next batch

Welcome to Batch 1! Let's start with three essential words:

1. كِتَابٌ (kitaabun) - book 📖
2. بَيْتٌ (baytun) - house 🏠
3. قَلَمٌ (qalamun) - pen ✏️

Practice these with the flashcards in the left panel!
